name: Avocado Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the avocados in half.
2. Remove the seeds and skin.
3. Place the avocados, lemon/lime juice, onion, garlic, green chiles, and salt in a blender.
4. Blend until well mixed.
5. Stir in the tomato.
6. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
7. This dressing will retain its color due to the citrus juice.
8. Serve as a dressing for cooked or raw vegetables, such as cauliflower, carrots, tomatoes, green beans, or on any salad.
